tests.scenario: Ensure meditation session remains stable during network issues
steps: Simulate a network problem while in the session
tests.expected_result: The session pauses or displays an error message without crashing, allowing the user to resume when connection is restored.
tests.notes: clarified recovery behavior and emphasized resuming session for hybrid requirement FR1.

tests.scenario: App responds quickly when user interacts with features
tests.expected_result: The app responds within 2 seconds and displays the meditation interface without noticeable delays.
tests.notes: maintained original scenario and steps, confirmed timing aligns with hybrid requirement FR2.

tests.expected_result: User can view, update, and cancel subscription plan easily with clear instructions.
tests.notes: emphasized clarity and ease of use to match hybrid requirement FR3.

tests.scenario: User receives clear subscription renewal notifications
steps: View account dashboard with approaching subscription renewal
tests.expected_result: Clear notification about upcoming renewal and pricing is displayed, and user can take action if needed.
tests.notes: added expected actions to match hybrid requirement FR4.

tests.scenario: App recovers from technical issues during meditation session
steps: Launch the meditation app and start a new session
Simulate a technical issue by forcing the app to crash during the session
tests.expected_result: The app automatically recovers or provides a seamless way to resume the meditation session without data loss.
tests.notes: clarified recovery and resumed session behavior for hybrid requirement FR5.

tests.scenario: Access meditation content offline without issues
steps: Download meditation content for offline use
Select a downloaded meditation session to play
tests.expected_result: The downloaded meditation session plays correctly without performance issues or loss of functionality.

tests.scenario: Access core mental wellness features without paywalls
steps: Search for and access core mental wellness features
tests.expected_result: Core mental wellness features are accessible without encountering paywalls or excessive fees.

tests.scenario: Review pricing for premium features transparently
steps: Navigate to the premium features section
tests.expected_result: User understands costs and benefits clearly, without feeling misled or overcharged.
tests.notes: clarified transparency and comprehension to match hybrid requirement FR8.

tests.scenario: Navigate main menu and access features efficiently
tests.expected_result: User can access meditation sessions, settings, and profile information within 2 clicks.
tests.notes: emphasized 'within 2 clicks' to align with hybrid requirement FR9.

tests.scenario: Verify clean and organized visual design
tests.expected_result: Screen is free of unnecessary graphics and text, and meditation guidance is clearly displayed in a calm and readable font.
